// <auto-generated/>
#nullable enable

using Microsoft.Extensions.DependencyInjection;

namespace TestAssembly
{
    /// <summary>
    /// Extension methods for registering services from TestAssembly.
    /// </summary>
    public static class TestAssemblyServiceCollectionExtensions
    {
        /// <summary>
        /// Registers all default services.
        /// </summary>
        public static IServiceCollection AddTestAssembly(this IServiceCollection services)
        {
            services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Dependency1, global::TestNamespace.Dependency1>("dep1");
            services.AddSingleton<global::TestNamespace.Dependency2, global::TestNamespace.Dependency2>();
            services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.MyService>("myService", (global::System.IServiceProvider sp, object? key) =>
            {
                var p1 = sp.GetRequiredKeyedService<global::TestNamespace.IDependency1>("dep1");
                var p2 = sp.GetRequiredService<global::TestNamespace.IDependency2>();
                var s0 = new global::TestNamespace.MyService(sp, p1, p2, key);
                return s0;
            });
            services.AddKeyedSingleton<global::TestNamespace.IMyService>("myService", (global::System.IServiceProvider sp, object? key) => sp.GetRequiredKeyedService<global::TestNamespace.MyService>(key));

            return services;
        }
    }
}
